name: Jess

face_lock.skin_finish: natural glow, no foundation, visible light freckles across nose
face_lock.hair_color: dark honey brown with sun-bleached lighter ends
face_lock.hair_length: mid-back, usually in high ponytail or messy bun
face_lock.jawline: heart-shaped face, defined cheekbones, softer chin
face_lock.nose_shape: small straight nose, slightly upturned tip
face_lock.lip_shape: full bottom lip, thinner top lip, always in clear gloss or balm
distinguishing_marks: light freckles across nose and upper cheeks
small scar on right eyebrow from childhood
face_lock.signature_accessory: black digital fitness watch on left wrist, small gold hoop earrings, thin gold initial 'J' necklace

body.build: athletic, toned arms and shoulders visible, strong legs

outfits.casual_home: cropped white tee, high-waist leggings, hair in messy bun, barefoot
outfits.going_out: fitted black tank top, distressed denim shorts, white sneakers, hair down and wavy
outfits.workout: bright coral sports bra, black high-waist compression leggings, cross-trainers, high ponytail, fitness watch
outfits.glam: fitted olive bodycon midi dress, strappy heels, hair in loose waves, smoky eye

prompt_seed: 28 year old mixed white and Puerto Rican woman, high energy motivational fitness vibe. Dark honey brown hair with sun-bleached lighter ends, thick wavy 2B texture, mid-back length in high ponytail. Warm olive-tan skin #D4A574, natural glow with no foundation, light freckles visible across nose and upper cheeks. Round bright hazel-green eyes with upturned outer corners. Small straight nose, slightly upturned tip. Full bottom lip with thinner top lip, clear gloss. Small scar through right eyebrow, visible collarbone definition. Black digital fitness watch on left wrist, small gold hoop earrings, thin gold 'J' initial necklace (always). Athletic toned build, defined arms and shoulders. Bright coral sports bra with black compression leggings. Infectious smile, radiates approachable energy.
